chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1340 and 3171 of 2024 Shabbir Aslam Versus The Secretary Defence & others Date Order with signature of Judge C.P. No.D-1340 of 2024 For orders as to maintainability of petition. C.P. No.D-3171 of 2024 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 4. 2. For orders on CMA 14168/24 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 09.08.2024 None for the petitioner. -.-.- These petitions seek submission of details on oath regarding the assets/properties and accounts of some of the respondents, however, the petitioner who is appearing in person is called absent. He was also called absent on the last date. There is no intimation either. The petitions are as such dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
